mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO c_user_third_party (user_id, platform, open_id, union_id, bind_nickname, bind_avatar, creator, updater, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES
(#{item.userId}, #{item.platform}, #{item.openId}, #{item.unionId}, #{item.bindNickname}, #{item.bindAvatar}, #{item.creator}, #{item.updater}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)

INSERT INTO c_user_third_party (user_id, platform, open_id, union_id, bind_nickname, bind_avatar, creator, updater, create_time, update_time, deleted) VALUES
(#{item.userId}, #{item.platform}, #{item.openId}, #{item.unionId}, #{item.bindNickname}, #{item.bindAvatar}, #{item.creator}, #{item.updater}, NOW(), NOW(), 0)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE union_id = VALUES(union_id), bind_nickname = VALUES(bind_nickname), bind_avatar = VALUES(bind_avatar), updater = VALUES(updater), update_time = NOW()
